title: CapabilityToken
description: Short-lived capability token. Issued by nervus at dispatch time, passed to anima via --token-file, presented to tela at MCP connection time via clientInfo.capability_token.

token_id.description: Unique token identifier. Prefixed with 'tok_' for log readability.

tools_profile.description: tela profile name this token grants access to

persona_ref.description: Reference to a PersonaSpec. May be an id (e.g. 'code-reviewer'), an id@digest_prefix (e.g. 'code-reviewer@a1b2c3d4'), or a file path.

instance_id.description: Agent instance this token is bound to. One token per instance.

max_depth.description: Maximum sub-agent depth this token permits

expires_at.description: Token expiration time. tela rejects expired tokens.

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature. Input: canonical JSON of all fields except 'signature' (sorted keys, no whitespace). Shared secret between nervus and tela.
